TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_Yasu-zen, title = Yasu-zen, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/Yasu-zen} }

S.FORM: == Yasu-zenšļěŤŅįšļļ == Yasu-zen " Yala-mu-yi "‹•‹°‹ź ‹ź‹¨‹ė‹™‹Ě‹ź, Sipulay-ye "◊ź◊©◊ē◊®◊ô◊Ě, Alapuo-yi " ōßŔĄōĘōīŔąōĪŔäŔąŔÜ‚Äé, pangangan han tu Siliya-zen "Syriaca", itida maudip i Siya nu tusaay a sawacan amisan nu binacadan, u Alade-zen a kakenihan. i sumamad, kamu nuheni u Akate-yi ku tade kamu nuheni, dikudan sa u Alami-yi. Yasu-zen itida i Siya makaala tu sepat a malebutan nu mahcaan nuheni. nu sumamaday a zitay nu Yasu-zen u hitay ku kaadihan, hina pacaw ku nuheni, milauyt tu Yahua a Yasu-tikuo kaadihan i tawya. nikudan idawtu ku midebungay tu nuhenian sisa haymaw satu caay pisatahaw ku nuheni. šļěŤŅįšļļ ,ŚŹąÁ®ĪśēėŚą©šļěšļļ(Syriacs), . sakaetimanś¶āŤ¶Ā kunyun nu ayawan a caysip nu sici atu nu ayawan a cacay a bataan nu seci, mikuwanay nu Miesu-puta-miya a Yasu-zen a lalangawan atu palutatengaan tu tidaay a tademaw patina. namaka kunyun nu ayawan tu nemsep-siw mihcaan malawpes tu ku Siyasu-di'kuo, nikudan satu u Yasu-zen kuwanen tu nu katuuday a kanatalan sayaway sa u Sinpapi-lundi-kuo, Puose-dikuo, Sila-zen atu Luoma-dikuo. itini ayawan nu tulu a secian, Yasu-zen palutatengaan nu heni u Asue-sen " Ashur", nikudan sumad han nuheni tu Citu-ciw. . cun seci Alapuo-dikuo misaahebal katukuh i Minsuputa-miya amisa sa, caay palutatengan tu Yiselan-ciw a Yasu-zen u sasawacuen ku nuehni. ayda a Tue-ci E'tuman-dikuo mikuwan tu nikudan, muenengay i tidaay nu Yasu-zen palutatengan tu cituciw, malecad atu Yamin Niya-zen, patayen nu Tueci E'tuman ku hatidaay nu tademawan, katuud ku tademaw nu Yasu-zen malingatu tu mihinang misatadas aca tu kakitidaan, idaw ku adidiay nu Yasiya " aydaay nu Tue'-ci" a Yasu-zin haymaw sa mawada ku tademaw. maedis ku Yasu-zen atu malepacaw, namaka caysiw a seci tu hedek katukuh tu tusep nu linatu a secian nu kitakidan mapabulasak tu namin. . aydaay nu Yasu-zenÁē∂šĽ£šļěŤŅįšļļ aydaay nu Yasu-zen i Cuntun kitidaan a tademaw u iluc nu Ku-Yasu-zen a Citu-tu, ayda, pulung nu kanatal makaala tu tusep-sep nu pinaay a wan nu Yasu-zen. Yasu-zen itini i siya kitidaan a Yila-ke' amisan, Sili-ya, Yilan nutipan atu Lipa-nen atu Yedan idaw henay ku katuuday nu tademawan. itida i Tue-ci wali nutipan idaw henay ku pinaay a tademawan nu Yasu-zen. Yela-ke' u Yasu-zen a tatapangan nu kitidaan, sayadahay nu pulung nu kitakidan a Yasu-zen kitidaan. . nika itini i tusep-seplu mihcaan palekal ku Amilika tu sakalepacawan tu Yila-ke' kilul sa malawlaw tu namin ku katuuday, hatudaaytu nu Yasu-zen hida satu mabulaw, mabulaw taydan i biyaw a kanatalan atu tayda i nu dumaan a kanatalan, Yila-ke' nu Yasu-zen mawada' tu pankiw nu tademawan, i Sili-ya, Yedan, Amilika atu Zuydin a kanatalan ayda nu pina nu mihcaan yadahyadah ku tademaw nu Yasu-zen. Amilika a Dite'liu atu Zuydin a Nantayli-ya idaw ku namaka Cuntun a Yasu-zen nu namaka tabakiay a niyaduan, idaw ku nipatideng nuheni tu kiwkay, patiyamay, tataydaan midang a kitidaan. . palutatengaan u kilisetušŅ°šĽįŚüļÁĚ£śēô ayda palutatengan nu Yasu-zen u Tunha-yasu-kiwkay, Ciasedin-li-tencuciw atu Siliya-cenciw-huy. idaw henay ku caayay ka hacica nu tademawan musakamu tu Kuala-miyi nisumadan tu aydaay nu sasakamuen tu Aalmiyi " Neo-Aramaic", sakamusa ku nuheni u Sinya-suyi "Neo-Assyrian". ayda nina Yasu-zen idaw henay ku nipiliwan tu lisi nu sumamaday a sasalisinan. hata nu Yasu-zen uhenitu ku patucekay tu hata nuheni, uyda a hataan u mabulasakay nu Yasu-zen a kanatal nu hataan. (Neo-Aramaic),šĽĖŚÄĎÁ®ĪÁāļśĖįšļěŤŅįŤ™ě(Neo-Assyrian). . idaw ku miduducay Yasu-zen nu ilucan tu palutatengaan tu Yeselan-ciw, nganganan u Muhala-mizin " Mhallami". i Siliya atu Liapnen kitidaan, itidaay a tademaw idaw henay ku iluc nu Alami-zen " si nganganan tu Yalin-zen", palutatengaan nuheni tu u Citu-ciw, sakay kiwkay nu sasakamuen nuheni u Alami-yi. ayda iluc nu Alami-zen atu aydaay nu Yasu-zen matinengay hakiya u malecaday ku nuheni a binacadan. kinlaw henay tu nuhenian ayda. (Mhallami). .
S.PHON: == jasu-z…ôn*** == jasu-z…ôn " jar~…ĺa-mu-ji "*** ******, sipur~…ĺaj-j…ô "******, ar~…ĺapuo-ji " **********, paŇčaŇčan ńßan tu sir~…ĺija-z…ôn "sjria ¶a", itida maudip i sija nu tusaaj a sawa ¶an amisan nu bina ¶adan, u ar~…ĺad…ô-z…ôn a kak…ônińßan. i sumamad, kamu nuńß…ôni u akat…ô-ji ku tad…ô kamu nuńß…ôni, dikudan sa u ar~…ĺami-ji. jasu-z…ôn itida i sija makaar~…ĺa tu s…ôpat a mar~…ĺ…ôbutan nu mańß ¶aan nuńß…ôni. nu sumamadaj a zitaj nu jasu-z…ôn u ńßitaj ku kaadińßan, ńßina pa ¶aw ku nuńß…ôni, mir~…ĺaujt tu jańßua a jasu-tikuo kaadińßan i tawja. nikudan idawtu ku mid…ôbuŇčaj tu nuńß…ônian sisa ńßajmaw satu ¶aaj pisatańßaw ku nuńß…ôni. *** ,******(sjria ¶s), . saka…ôtiman** kunjun nu ajawan a ¶ajsip nu si ¶i atu nu ajawan a ¶a ¶aj a bataan nu s…ô ¶i, mikuwanaj nu mi…ôsu-puta-mija a jasu-z…ôn a r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan atu par~…ĺutat…ôŇčaan tu tidaaj a tad…ômaw patina. namaka kunjun nu ajawan tu n…ôms…ôp-siw mińß ¶aan mar~…ĺawp…ôs tu ku sijasu-di Ē~ °kuo, nikudan satu u jasu-z…ôn kuwan…ôn tu nu katuudaj a kanatar~…ĺan sajawaj sa u sinpapi-r~…ĺundi-kuo, puos…ô-dikuo, sir~…ĺa-z…ôn atu r~…ĺuoma-dikuo. itini ajawan nu tur~…ĺu a s…ô ¶ian, jasu-z…ôn par~…ĺutat…ôŇčaan nu ńß…ôni u asu…ô-s…ôn " asńßur", nikudan sumad ńßan nuńß…ôni tu ¶itu- ¶iw. . ¶un s…ô ¶i ar~…ĺapuo-dikuo misaańß…ôbar~…ĺ katukuńß i minsuputa-mija amisa sa, ¶aaj par~…ĺutat…ôŇčan tu jis…ôr~…ĺan- ¶iw a jasu-z…ôn u sasawa ¶u…ôn ku nu…ôńßni. ajda a tu…ô- ¶i …ô Ē~ °tuman-dikuo mikuwan tu nikudan, mu…ôn…ôŇčaj i tidaaj nu jasu-z…ôn par~…ĺutat…ôŇčan tu ¶itu ¶iw, mar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad atu jamin nija-z…ôn, pataj…ôn nu tu…ô ¶i …ô Ē~ °tuman ku ńßatidaaj nu tad…ômawan, katuud ku tad…ômaw nu jasu-z…ôn mar~…ĺiŇčatu tu mińßinaŇč misatadas a ¶a tu kakitidaan, idaw ku adidiaj nu jasija " ajdaaj nu tu…ô Ē~ °- ¶i" a jasu-zin ńßajmaw sa mawada ku tad…ômaw. ma…ôdis ku jasu-z…ôn atu mar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶aw, namaka ¶ajsiw a s…ô ¶i tu ńß…ôd…ôk katukuńß tu tus…ôp nu r~…ĺinatu a s…ô ¶ian nu kitakidan mapabur~…ĺasak tu namin. . ajdaaj nu jasu-z…ôn***** ajdaaj nu jasu-z…ôn i ¶untun kitidaan a tad…ômaw u ir~…ĺu ¶ nu ku-jasu-z…ôn a ¶itu-tu, ajda, pur~…ĺuŇč nu kanatar~…ĺ makaar~…ĺa tu tus…ôp-s…ôp nu pinaaj a wan nu jasu-z…ôn. jasu-z…ôn itini i sija kitidaan a jir~…ĺa-k…ô Ē~ ° amisan, sir~…ĺi-ja, jir~…ĺan nutipan atu r~…ĺipa-n…ôn atu j…ôdan idaw ńß…ônaj ku katuudaj nu tad…ômawan. itida i tu…ô- ¶i war~…ĺi nutipan idaw ńß…ônaj ku pinaaj a tad…ômawan nu jasu-z…ôn. j…ôr~…ĺa-k…ô Ē~ ° u jasu-z…ôn a tatapaŇčan nu kitidaan, sajadańßaj nu pur~…ĺuŇč nu kitakidan a jasu-z…ôn kitidaan. . nika itini i tus…ôp-s…ôpr~…ĺu mińß ¶aan par~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺ ku amir~…ĺika tu sakar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶awan tu jir~…ĺa-k…ô Ē~ ° kir~…ĺur~…ĺ sa mar~…ĺawr~…ĺaw tu namin ku katuudaj, ńßatudaajtu nu jasu-z…ôn ńßida satu mabur~…ĺaw, mabur~…ĺaw tajdan i bijaw a kanatar~…ĺan atu tajda i nu dumaan a kanatar~…ĺan, jir~…ĺa-k…ô Ē~ ° nu jasu-z…ôn mawada Ē~ ° tu pankiw nu tad…ômawan, i sir~…ĺi-ja, j…ôdan, amir~…ĺika atu zujdin a kanatar~…ĺan ajda nu pina nu mińß ¶aan jadańßjadańß ku tad…ômaw nu jasu-z…ôn. amir~…ĺika a dit…ô Ē~ °r~…ĺiu atu zujdin a nantajr~…ĺi-ja idaw ku namaka ¶untun a jasu-z…ôn nu namaka tabakiaj a nijaduan, idaw ku nipatid…ôŇč nuńß…ôni tu kiwkaj, patijamaj, tatajdaan midaŇč a kitidaan. . par~…ĺutat…ôŇčaan u kir~…ĺis…ôtu***** ajda par~…ĺutat…ôŇčan nu jasu-z…ôn u tunńßa-jasu-kiwkaj, ¶ias…ôdin-r~…ĺi-t…ôn ¶u ¶iw atu sir~…ĺija- ¶…ôn ¶iw-ńßuj. idaw ńß…ônaj ku ¶aajaj ka ńßa ¶i ¶a nu tad…ômawan musakamu tu kuar~…ĺa-miji nisumadan tu ajdaaj nu sasakamu…ôn tu aar~…ĺmiji " n…ôo-aramai ¶", sakamusa ku nuńß…ôni u sinja-suji "n…ôo-assjrian". ajda nina jasu-z…ôn idaw ńß…ônaj ku nipir~…ĺiwan tu r~…ĺisi nu sumamadaj a sasar~…ĺisinan. ńßata nu jasu-z…ôn uńß…ônitu ku patu ¶…ôkaj tu ńßata nuńß…ôni, ujda a ńßataan u mabur~…ĺasakaj nu jasu-z…ôn a kanatar~…ĺ nu ńßataan. (n…ôo-aramai ¶),********(n…ôo-assjrian). . idaw ku midudu ¶aj jasu-z…ôn nu ir~…ĺu ¶an tu par~…ĺutat…ôŇčaan tu j…ôs…ôr~…ĺan- ¶iw, ŇčaŇčanan u muńßar~…ĺa-mizin " mńßar~…ĺr~…ĺami". i sir~…ĺija atu r~…ĺiapn…ôn kitidaan, itidaaj a tad…ômaw idaw ńß…ônaj ku ir~…ĺu ¶ nu ar~…ĺami-z…ôn " si ŇčaŇčanan tu jar~…ĺin-z…ôn", par~…ĺutat…ôŇčaan nuńß…ôni tu u ¶itu- ¶iw, sakaj kiwkaj nu sasakamu…ôn nuńß…ôni u ar~…ĺami-ji. ajda ir~…ĺu ¶ nu ar~…ĺami-z…ôn atu ajdaaj nu jasu-z…ôn matin…ôŇčaj ńßakija u mar~…ĺ…ô ¶adaj ku nuńß…ôni a bina ¶adan. kinr~…ĺaw ńß…ônaj tu nuńß…ônian ajda. (mńßar~…ĺr~…ĺami). .
S.FORM: == Yasu-zenšļěŤŅįšļļ == Yasu-zen " Yala-mu-yi "‹•‹°‹ź ‹ź‹¨‹ė‹™‹Ě‹ź, Sipulay-ye "◊ź◊©◊ē◊®◊ô◊Ě, Alapuo-yi " ōßŔĄōĘōīŔąōĪŔäŔąŔÜ‚Äé, pangangan han tu Siliya-zen "Syriaca", itida maudip i Siya nu tusaay a sawacan amisan nu binacadan, u Alade-zen a kakenihan. i sumamad, kamu nuheni u Akate-yi ku tade kamu nuheni, dikudan sa u Alami-yi. Yasu-zen itida i Siya makaala tu sepat a malebutan nu mahcaan nuheni. nu sumamaday a zitay nu Yasu-zen u hitay ku kaadihan, hina pacaw ku nuheni, milauyt tu Yahua a Yasu-tikuo kaadihan i tawya. nikudan idawtu ku midebungay tu nuhenian sisa haymaw satu caay pisatahaw ku nuheni. šļěŤŅįšļļ ,ŚŹąÁ®ĪśēėŚą©šļěšļļ(Syriacs), . sakaetimanś¶āŤ¶Ā kunyun nu ayawan a caysip nu sici atu nu ayawan a cacay a bataan nu seci, mikuwanay nu Miesu-puta-miya a Yasu-zen a lalangawan atu palutatengaan tu tidaay a tademaw patina. namaka kunyun nu ayawan tu nemsep-siw mihcaan malawpes tu ku Siyasu-di'kuo, nikudan satu u Yasu-zen kuwanen tu nu katuuday a kanatalan sayaway sa u Sinpapi-lundi-kuo, Puose-dikuo, Sila-zen atu Luoma-dikuo. itini ayawan nu tulu a secian, Yasu-zen palutatengaan nu heni u Asue-sen " Ashur", nikudan sumad han nuheni tu Citu-ciw. . cun seci Alapuo-dikuo misaahebal katukuh i Minsuputa-miya amisa sa, caay palutatengan tu Yiselan-ciw a Yasu-zen u sasawacuen ku nuehni. ayda a Tue-ci E'tuman-dikuo mikuwan tu nikudan, muenengay i tidaay nu Yasu-zen palutatengan tu cituciw, malecad atu Yamin Niya-zen, patayen nu Tueci E'tuman ku hatidaay nu tademawan, katuud ku tademaw nu Yasu-zen malingatu tu mihinang misatadas aca tu kakitidaan, idaw ku adidiay nu Yasiya " aydaay nu Tue'-ci" a Yasu-zin haymaw sa mawada ku tademaw. maedis ku Yasu-zen atu malepacaw, namaka caysiw a seci tu hedek katukuh tu tusep nu linatu a secian nu kitakidan mapabulasak tu namin. . aydaay nu Yasu-zenÁē∂šĽ£šļěŤŅįšļļ aydaay nu Yasu-zen i Cuntun kitidaan a tademaw u iluc nu Ku-Yasu-zen a Citu-tu, ayda, pulung nu kanatal makaala tu tusep-sep nu pinaay a wan nu Yasu-zen. Yasu-zen itini i siya kitidaan a Yila-ke' amisan, Sili-ya, Yilan nutipan atu Lipa-nen atu Yedan idaw henay ku katuuday nu tademawan. itida i Tue-ci wali nutipan idaw henay ku pinaay a tademawan nu Yasu-zen. Yela-ke' u Yasu-zen a tatapangan nu kitidaan, sayadahay nu pulung nu kitakidan a Yasu-zen kitidaan. . nika itini i tusep-seplu mihcaan palekal ku Amilika tu sakalepacawan tu Yila-ke' kilul sa malawlaw tu namin ku katuuday, hatudaaytu nu Yasu-zen hida satu mabulaw, mabulaw taydan i biyaw a kanatalan atu tayda i nu dumaan a kanatalan, Yila-ke' nu Yasu-zen mawada' tu pankiw nu tademawan, i Sili-ya, Yedan, Amilika atu Zuydin a kanatalan ayda nu pina nu mihcaan yadahyadah ku tademaw nu Yasu-zen. Amilika a Dite'liu atu Zuydin a Nantayli-ya idaw ku namaka Cuntun a Yasu-zen nu namaka tabakiay a niyaduan, idaw ku nipatideng nuheni tu kiwkay, patiyamay, tataydaan midang a kitidaan. . palutatengaan u kilisetušŅ°šĽįŚüļÁĚ£śēô ayda palutatengan nu Yasu-zen u Tunha-yasu-kiwkay, Ciasedin-li-tencuciw atu Siliya-cenciw-huy. idaw henay ku caayay ka hacica nu tademawan musakamu tu Kuala-miyi nisumadan tu aydaay nu sasakamuen tu Aalmiyi " Neo-Aramaic", sakamusa ku nuheni u Sinya-suyi "Neo-Assyrian". ayda nina Yasu-zen idaw henay ku nipiliwan tu lisi nu sumamaday a sasalisinan. hata nu Yasu-zen uhenitu ku patucekay tu hata nuheni, uyda a hataan u mabulasakay nu Yasu-zen a kanatal nu hataan. (Neo-Aramaic),šĽĖŚÄĎÁ®ĪÁāļśĖįšļěŤŅįŤ™ě(Neo-Assyrian). . idaw ku miduducay Yasu-zen nu ilucan tu palutatengaan tu Yeselan-ciw, nganganan u Muhala-mizin " Mhallami". i Siliya atu Liapnen kitidaan, itidaay a tademaw idaw henay ku iluc nu Alami-zen " si nganganan tu Yalin-zen", palutatengaan nuheni tu u Citu-ciw, sakay kiwkay nu sasakamuen nuheni u Alami-yi. ayda iluc nu Alami-zen atu aydaay nu Yasu-zen matinengay hakiya u malecaday ku nuheni a binacadan. kinlaw henay tu nuhenian ayda. (Mhallami). .

nu mi…ôsu-puta-mija a jasu-z…ôn a r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan atu par~…ĺutat…ôŇčaan tu tidaaj a tad…ômaw patina. namaka kunjun nu ajawan tu n…ôms…ôp-siw mińß ¶aan mar~…ĺawp…ôs tu ku sijasu-di Ē~ °kuo, nikudan par~…ĺutat…ôŇčaan nu ńß…ôni u asu…ô-s…ôn " asńßur", nikudan sumad ńßan nuńß…ôni tu ¶itu- ¶iw. . ¶un s…ô ¶i ar~…ĺapuo-dikuo misaańß…ôbar~…ĺ katukuńß i minsuputa-mija amisa sa, ¶aaj par~…ĺutat…ôŇčan tu nija-z…ôn, pataj…ôn nu tu…ô ¶i …ô Ē~ °tuman ku ńßatidaaj nu tad…ômawan, katuud ku tad…ômaw nu jasu-z…ôn mar~…ĺiŇčatu tu mińßinaŇč misatadas a ¶a tu kakitidaan, idaw ku adidiaj nu jasija " ajdaaj nu tu…ô Ē~ °- ¶i" a jasu-zin ńßajmaw sa mawada ku tad…ômaw. ma…ôdis ku jasu-z…ôn atu mar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶aw, namaka ¶ajsiw a s…ô ¶i tu ńß…ôd…ôk katukuńß tu tus…ôp nu r~…ĺinatu a s…ô ¶ian nu kitakidan mapabur~…ĺasak tu namin. . ajdaaj nu jasu-z…ôn***** ajdaaj nu jasu-z…ôn i ¶untun kitidaan a tad…ômaw u ir~…ĺu ¶ nu ku-jasu-z…ôn a ¶itu-tu, ajda, pur~…ĺuŇč nu kanatar~…ĺ makaar~…ĺa tu tus…ôp-s…ôp nu pinaaj a wan nu jasu-z…ôn. jasu-z…ôn itini i sija kitidaan a jir~…ĺa-k…ô Ē~ ° amisan, sir~…ĺi-ja, jir~…ĺan nutipan atu r~…ĺipa-n…ôn atu j…ôdan idaw ńß…ônaj ku katuudaj nu tad…ômawan. itida i tu…ô- ¶i war~…ĺi nutipan idaw ńß…ônaj ku pinaaj a tad…ômawan nu jasu-z…ôn. j…ôr~…ĺa-k…ô Ē~ ° u jasu-z…ôn a tatapaŇčan nu kitidaan, sajadańßaj nu pur~…ĺuŇč nu kitakidan a jasu-z…ôn kitidaan. . nika itini i tus…ôp-s…ôpr~…ĺu mińß ¶aan par~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺ ku amir~…ĺika tu sakar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶awan tu jir~…ĺa-k…ô Ē~ ° kir~…ĺur~…ĺ sa mar~…ĺawr~…ĺaw tu namin ku katuudaj, ńßatudaajtu nu jasu-z…ôn ńßida satu mabur~…ĺaw, mabur~…ĺaw tajdan i bijaw a kanatar~…ĺan atu tajda i nu dumaan a kanatar~…ĺan, jir~…ĺa-k…ô Ē~ ° nu jasu-z…ôn mawada Ē~ ° tu pankiw nu tad…ômawan, i sir~…ĺi-ja, j…ôdan, amir~…ĺika atu zujdin a kanatar~…ĺan ajda nu pina nu mińß ¶aan jadańßjadańß ku tad…ômaw nu jasu-z…ôn. amir~…ĺika a dit…ô Ē~ °r~…ĺiu atu zujdin a nantajr~…ĺi-ja idaw ku namaka ¶untun a jasu-z…ôn nu namaka tabakiaj a nijaduan, idaw ku nipatid…ôŇč nuńß…ôni tu kiwkaj, patijamaj, tatajdaan midaŇč a kitidaan. . par~…ĺutat…ôŇčaan u kir~…ĺis…ôtu***** ajda par~…ĺutat…ôŇčan nu jasu-z…ôn u tunńßa-jasu-kiwkaj, ¶ias…ôdin-r~…ĺi-t…ôn ¶u ¶iw atu sir~…ĺija- ¶…ôn ¶iw-ńßuj. idaw ńß…ônaj ku ¶aajaj ka ńßa ¶i ¶a nu tad…ômawan musakamu tu kuar~…ĺa-miji nisumadan tu ajdaaj nu sasakamu…ôn tu aar~…ĺmiji " n…ôo-aramai ¶", sakamusa ku nuńß…ôni u sinja-suji "n…ôo-assjrian". ajda nina jasu-z…ôn idaw ńß…ônaj ku nipir~…ĺiwan tu r~…ĺisi nu sumamadaj a sasar~…ĺisinan. ńßata nu jasu-z…ôn uńß…ônitu ku patu ¶…ôkaj tu ńßata nuńß…ôni, ujda a ńßataan u mabur~…ĺasakaj nu jasu-z…ôn a kanatar~…ĺ nu ńßataan. (n…ôo-aramai ¶),********(n…ôo-assjrian). . idaw ku midudu ¶aj jasu-z…ôn nu ir~…ĺu ¶an tu par~…ĺutat…ôŇčaan tu j…ôs…ôr~…ĺan- ¶iw, ŇčaŇčanan u muńßar~…ĺa-mizin " mńßar~…ĺr~…ĺami". i sir~…ĺija atu r~…ĺiapn…ôn kitidaan, itidaaj a tad…ômaw idaw ńß…ônaj ku ir~…ĺu ¶ nu ar~…ĺami-z…ôn " si ŇčaŇčanan tu jar~…ĺin-z…ôn", par~…ĺutat…ôŇčaan nuńß…ôni tu u ¶itu- ¶iw, sakaj kiwkaj nu sasakamu…ôn nuńß…ôni u ar~…ĺami-ji. ajda ir~…ĺu ¶ nu ar~…ĺami-z…ôn atu ajdaaj nu jasu-z…ôn matin…ôŇčaj ńßakija u mar~…ĺ…ô ¶adaj ku nuńß…ôni a bina ¶adan. kinr~…ĺaw ńß…ônaj tu nuńß…ônian ajda. (mńßar~…ĺr~…ĺami). .
